pull.title: [Kernel] Add support for block FP8 on SM120 (NVIDIA 5090 and RTX PRO 6000)
pull.body:
# Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist

- [x] The purpose of the PR, such as "Fix some issue (link existing issues this PR will resolve)".
- [x] The test plan, such as providing test command.
- [x] The test results, such as pasting the results comparison before and after, or e2e results
- [ ] (Optional) The necessary documentation update, such as updating `supported_models.md` and `examples` for a new model.


## Purpose
Add support for block FP8 on SM120 (NVIDIA 5090 and RTX PRO 6000).

## Test Plan
```
vllm serve vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-8B-FP8
vllm bench serve --backend vllm --dataset-name sharegpt --dataset-path ./ShareGPT_V3_unfiltered_cleaned_split.json  --base-url http://localhost:8000  --endpoint /v1/completions --model Qwen/Qwen3-8B-FP8 --tokenizer Qwen/Qwen3-8B-FP8 --num-prompts 1000
--max-concurrency 100
```

## Test Result

Qwen/Qwen3-8B-FP8 runs successfully with the following performance on 5090

```

============ Serving Benchmark Result ============
Successful requests:                     1000
Benchmark duration (s):                  62.11
Total input tokens:                      217393
Total generated tokens:                  201775
Request throughput (req/s):              16.10
Output token throughput (tok/s):         3248.91
Total Token throughput (tok/s):          6749.29
---------------Time to First Token----------------
Mean TTFT (ms):                          77.25
Median TTFT (ms):                        70.08
P99 TTFT (ms):                           216.34
-----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------
Mean TPOT (ms):                          26.79
Median TPOT (ms):                        25.98
P99 TPOT (ms):                           43.40
---------------Inter-token Latency----------------
Mean ITL (ms):                           25.85
Median ITL (ms):                         21.87
P99 ITL (ms):                            64.50
==================================================


```

Performance is comparable to the non-block FP8 model RedHatAI/Qwen3-8B-FP8-dynamic (below)

```
============ Serving Benchmark Result ============
Successful requests:                     1000
Benchmark duration (s):                  61.05
Total input tokens:                      217393
Total generated tokens:                  201740
Request throughput (req/s):              16.38
Output token throughput (tok/s):         3304.39
Total Token throughput (tok/s):          6865.17
---------------Time to First Token----------------
Mean TTFT (ms):                          72.48
Median TTFT (ms):                        63.28
P99 TTFT (ms):                           204.85
-----Time per Output Token (excl. 1st token)------
Mean TPOT (ms):                          26.25
Median TPOT (ms):                        25.46
P99 TPOT (ms):                           43.68
---------------Inter-token Latency----------------
Mean ITL (ms):                           25.39
Median ITL (ms):                         21.40
P99 ITL (ms):                            62.00
==================================================
```


## (Optional) Documentation Update
